preamble: The voiceless retroflex affricate [ʈʂ] merges with the voiceless postalveolar affricate [tʃ] in various Sinitic dialects.

examples.note: Systemic merger of the retroflex series into the postalveolar series.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
